div1.entryFree: Summons, a call, warning, citation: on this green land answer your s. Tp. IV, 131. stays but the s. of the appellant's trumpet, R2 I, 3, 4. to make this present s. H8 II, 4, 219. a heavy s. lies like lead upon me, and yet I would not sleep, Mcb. II, 1, 6. black Hecate's s. III, 2, 41. it started like a guilty thing upon a fearful s. Hml. I, 1, 149. why you answer this present s. Lr. V, 3, 121. what is the reason of this terrible s.? Oth. I, 1, 82.
